title: mentha × suavis var. lamiifolia
intro: Mentha × suavis var. lamiifolia, also known as spearmint or spearmint leaf mint, is a hybrid of the peppermint plant (Mentha × suavis) that has been cultivated for its unique, lamiifolia leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce nausea, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Mentha × suavis var. lamiifolia include its potential to alleviate headaches, improve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and capsules for medicinal use, as well as being used fresh in cooking and as a flavoring agent in beverages.
